title: No Report Button
description: Removes the chat report button from the game menu screen
body:
This mod simply removes the new 1.19.1+ chat report button from the game pause menu screen and replaces it with a disabled open to LAN button (when on a multiplayer server) like was done before 1.19.1.

Supports fabric, forge and quilt 1.19.1+  
Should be compatible with any mods, but if you do find a mod that is not please open an issue.

### New in v1.6.1

*   NeoForge is now supported for Minecraft 1.21+

**Fabric API not required.**

See [here](https://github.com/Lucaslah/No-Report-Button?tab=readme-ov-file#no-report-button) for what version to use, or check the files tab and download the latest NRB version that supports the version of Minecraft you are on.   

**Mod is only supported on the client side, the mod will do nothing if used on the server**
